case_title: DAVIS, WILLIAM vs. MAXWELL, NORM et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MAXWELL, NORM

PRO TEMP ARNOLD EVJE, M.NORMAN/CSR, K.LEE/CLERK 03:00PM CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. MICHAEL HALL FOR THE PLTF AND THE DEFTS NORM MAXWELL AND "JANE DOE" AKA OSOM MAXWELL ARE PRESENT IN PRO PER. CASE IS SETTLED. TERMS ON THE RECORD.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER VACATING STAY OF ENFORCEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, WILLIAM
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MAXWELL, NORM
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT MAXWELL, NORM
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT MAXWELL, NORM "JANE DOE" DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, WILLIAM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-01-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-07-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: DEFT COUNSEL R.DAVIS CONTACTED CLERK AT 12:20PM ADVISING THAT SHE WAS UNABLE TO APPEAR FOR SETTLEMENT CONF DUE TO COMPLICATIONS FOLLOWING HER ACCIDENT; REQUESTED TO CONDUCT SETTLEMENT CONF BY TELEPHONE. DEFT N. MAXWELL IS PRESENT. COURT INSTRUCTS PARTIES TO ATTEMPT A SETTLEMENT CONF BY TELEPHONE BUT TO CONFIRM CASE FOR TRIAL IF SETTLEMENT ON RECORD IS NECESSARY.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAXWELL, NORM "JANE DOE" THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: NOT IN ISSUE $3,550.00 RENT, $690.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $97.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,337.00, LEASE FORFEITED, JANE DOE IS ALSO AKA OSAB MAXWELL AS SHOWN IN THE COURT MINUTES DURING THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE.
